allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 6379, 5432 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Port $\($_.LocalPort\): PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)" })
